prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 91.8 kg; Height 176.4 cm; BMI 29.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 196mg/dL; 9 months ago 192mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 180mg/dL; current 177mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 93.9kg; 9 months ago 94.3kg; 6 months ago 91.3kg; 3 months ago 91.1kg; current 91.8kg), Height (12 months ago 176.4cm; 9 months ago 176.4cm; 6 months ago 176.4cm; 3 months ago 176.4cm; current 176.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 123mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 124mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 116U/L; 9 months ago 118U/L; 6 months ago 121U/L; 3 months ago 122U/L; current 126U/L), AST (12 months ago 60U/L; 9 months ago 59U/L; 6 months ago 54U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 59U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; current 34mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 92mg/g; 9 months ago 91mg/g; 6 months ago 139mg/g; 3 months ago 144mg/g; current 134mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 70mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 140mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 120mg/dL; 3 months ago 140mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
